Class NumericalConfiguration

java.lang.Object
org.episteme.core.mathematics.context.NumericalConfiguration
public class NumericalConfiguration extends Object
Configuration for numerical computation, including precision, backend preferences, and thresholds. Standardized as NumericalConfiguration in the mathematics.context package.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static enum 
    NumericalConfiguration.FloatPrecision
    Floating-point precision mode for GPU and numerical operations.
    static enum 
    NumericalConfiguration.IntPrecision
    Integer precision mode for GPU and numerical operations.
